title: Creating a Folder and Document via API
excerpt:
I’ve gone through the API docs and I can’t seem to find a way to create a folder and a new doc after creating a board via API.

posts.author: ramen (Alex Trinidad)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve gone through the API docs and I can’t seem to find a way to create a folder and a new doc after creating a board via API.

Is this something in the works? I saw a relevant post and I think the last time it was discussed was in 2021?

Would love to have that function available so we can work on a seamless onboarding sequence!
